message:
feat(providers): onboard Wave B3, C1, and special-routing providers with full metadata, tests, VCR harness, and docs

This commit lands three related provider-onboarding slices from the
bd-3uqg epic, completing the bulk of remaining OAI-compatible preset
work and resolving the special-routing classification decision:

## Wave B3 — Regional + coding-plan providers (bd-3uqg.5.3)

Adds 8 new provider presets to PROVIDER_METADATA:
  siliconflow, siliconflow-cn, upstage, venice,
  zai, zai-coding-plan, zhipuai, zhipuai-coding-plan

- siliconflow/siliconflow-cn are distinct regional IDs with separate
  auth env keys (SILICONFLOW_API_KEY vs SILICONFLOW_CN_API_KEY)
- zai/zhipuai families share ZHIPU_API_KEY but use distinct base URLs
  for standard vs coding-plan variants
- All use openai-completions API family with 128K context windows
- VCR smoke fixtures added for all 8 providers (simple_text,
  tool_call_single, error_auth_401 scenarios each)
- Lock tests: batch_b3_metadata_resolves_all_eight_providers,
  batch_b3_routing_defaults_use_openai_completions_with_expected_endpoints,
  ad_hoc_batch_b3_defaults_resolve_expected_routes,
  ad_hoc_batch_b3_coding_plan_and_regional_variants_remain_distinct
- Factory tests: wave_b3_presets_resolve_metadata_defaults_and_factory_route,
  wave_b3_openai_compat_streams_use_chat_completions_path_and_bearer_auth,
  wave_b3_family_and_coding_plan_variants_are_distinct

## Wave C1 — Local/self-hosted preset providers (bd-3uqg.6)

Adds 4 new provider presets:
  baseten (https://inference.baseten.co/v1, 262K context),
  llama (https://api.llama.com/compat/v1, multimodal text+image),
  lmstudio (http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1, local runtime),
  ollama-cloud (https://ollama.com/v1, 262K context, multimodal)

- All sourced from models.dev upstream registry (2026-02-12 snapshot)
- Ad-hoc default route tests in src/models.rs
- Staging documentation added to docs/providers.md and
  docs/provider-onboarding-playbook.md with extraction commands,
  mapping decisions, and status tables

## Special routing resolution (bd-3uqg.3.9)

Resolves the open question of whether opencode, vercel, and zenmux
require dedicated native routing logic or can use metadata-only
OAI-compatible adapter paths:

- opencode → openai-completions @ https://opencode.ai/zen/v1
- vercel → openai-completions @ https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v1
- zenmux → anthropic-messages @ https://zenmux.ai/api/anthropic/v1/messages
  (note: zenmux is the only non-OAI provider in this batch, using
  Anthropic Messages API with x-api-key auth instead of Bearer)

- VCR smoke fixtures for all 3 providers (simple_text, tool_call_single,
  error_auth_401 scenarios)
- SAP AI Core VCR fixtures also added (6 scenarios including unicode
  and rate-limit edge cases)
- Deterministic routing/override/failure tests in provider_factory.rs:
  special_routing_opencode_resolves_to_openai_completions_with_expected_url,
  special_routing_vercel_resolves_to_openai_completions_with_gateway_url,
  special_routing_zenmux_resolves_to_anthropic_messages,
  special_routing_override_base_url_is_honored, and more
- Wave C special smoke suite in provider_native_verify.rs (c_special_*)
- Updated provider_metadata_comprehensive factory helper to honor
  defaults.api for mixed API-family presets

Files changed:
- src/provider_metadata.rs: +441 lines (15 provider entries + 8 tests)
- src/models.rs: +81 lines (C1 ad-hoc defaults + B3/C1 route tests)
- tests/provider_factory.rs: +493 lines (routing + stream + override tests)
- tests/provider_native_verify.rs: +335 lines (B3 + C special smoke suites)
- tests/provider_metadata_comprehensive.rs: helper updates for mixed APIs
- docs/providers.md: B3 verification table + C staging snapshot
- docs/provider-onboarding-playbook.md: B3 lock test catalog + C defaults
- 45 VCR fixture JSON files under tests/fixtures/vcr/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+### 2e) Wave C canonical IDs (local/self-hosted/gateway staging)
+
+Source for defaults in this section:
+- `https://models.dev/api.json` (queried on 2026-02-12)
+- Extraction command:
+
+```bash
+curl -s https://models.dev/api.json | jq '{
+  baseten: {api: ."baseten".api, env: ."baseten".env},
+  llama: {api: ."llama".api, env: ."llama".env},
+  lmstudio: {api: ."lmstudio".api, env: ."lmstudio".env},
+  "ollama-cloud": {api: ."ollama-cloud".api, env: ."ollama-cloud".env},
+  opencode: {api: ."opencode".api, env: ."opencode".env},
+  vercel: {api: ."vercel".api, env: ."vercel".env},
+  zenmux: {api: ."zenmux".api, env: ."zenmux".env}
+}'
+```
+
+Current Wave C routing stance:
+- `baseten`, `llama`, `lmstudio`, and `ollama-cloud` are OpenAI-compatible preset candidates.
+- `opencode`, `vercel`, and `zenmux` remain coupled to special-routing decisions in `bd-3uqg.3.9`.
+
+Wave C defaults (from `models.dev`):
+
+| Provider ID | API family target | Default base URL | Auth env |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| `baseten` | `openai-completions` | `https://inference.baseten.co/v1` | `BASETEN_API_KEY` |
+| `llama` | `openai-completions` | `https://api.llama.com/compat/v1/` | `LLAMA_API_KEY` |
+| `lmstudio` | `openai-completions` | `http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1` | `LMSTUDIO_API_KEY` |
+| `ollama-cloud` | `openai-completions` | `https://ollama.com/v1` | `OLLAMA_API_KEY` |
+| `opencode` | `openai-completions` | `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1` | `OPENCODE_API_KEY` |
+| `vercel` | gateway-wrapper (`@ai-sdk/gateway`) | no static API URL in `models.dev` | `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` |
+| `zenmux` | `anthropic-messages` target (Anthropic-style gateway) | `https://zenmux.ai/api/anthropic/v1` | `ZENMUX_API_KEY` |
